example_zh: 这个物体在水中慢慢下沉。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge wù tǐ zài shuǐ zhōng màn màn xià chén.
example_en: This object slowly sank in the water.

example_zh: 这部喜剧让全场观众笑个不停。
example_pinyin: Zhè bù xǐ jù ràng quán chǎng guān zhòng xiào ge bù tíng.
example_en: This comedy made the whole audience laugh nonstop.

example_zh: 家里有喜事，亲戚们都来祝贺。
example_pinyin: Jiā lǐ yǒu xǐ shì, qīn qi men dōu lái zhù hè.
example_en: There was a happy event at home, and all the relatives came to offer congratulations.

example_zh: 她每天早上六点起床洗漱。
example_pinyin: Tā měi tiān zǎo shang liù diǎn qǐ chuáng xǐ shù.
example_en: She gets up at six every morning to wash up.

example_zh: 爷爷特别喜欢听地方戏曲。
example_pinyin: Yé ye tè bié xǐ huan tīng dì fāng xì qǔ.
example_en: Grandpa especially likes listening to local opera.

gloss: to put effort into; work hard at
example_zh: 她愿意下功夫把汉字写好。
example_pinyin: Tā yuàn yì xià gōngfu bǎ Hàn zì xiě hǎo.
example_en: She is willing to put effort into writing Chinese characters well.

example_zh: 我已经在网上下单买了教材。
example_pinyin: Wǒ yǐ jīng zài wǎng shàng xià dān mǎi le jiào cái.
example_en: I have already placed an online order for the textbook.

example_zh: 这个旧功能明天正式下线。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge jiù gōng néng míng tiān zhèng shì xià xiàn.
example_en: This old feature will officially go offline tomorrow.

gloss: last ten days of a month
example_zh: 展览将在八月下旬开幕。
example_pinyin: Zhǎn lǎn jiāng zài bā yuè xià xún kāi mù.
example_en: The exhibition will open in late August.

example_zh: 这件衣服显得他很精神。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiàn yī fu xiǎn de tā hěn jīng shén.
example_en: This outfit makes him look energetic.

example_zh: 山路很险，开车要慢一点。
example_pinyin: Shān lù hěn xiǎn, kāi chē yào màn yì diǎn.
example_en: The mountain road is dangerous, so drive a little slower.

example_zh: 每人限买两张票。
example_pinyin: Měi rén xiàn mǎi liǎng zhāng piào.
example_en: Each person is limited to buying two tickets.

example_zh: 请沿着这条线剪开。
example_pinyin: Qǐng yán zhe zhè tiáo xiàn jiǎn kāi.
example_en: Please cut along this line.

example_zh: 现存资料不足以证明这个结论。
example_pinyin: Xiàn cún zī liào bù zú yǐ zhèng míng zhè ge jié lùn.
example_en: The existing materials are not enough to prove this conclusion.

example_zh: 他的耐心已经到了限度。
example_pinyin: Tā de nài xīn yǐ jīng dào le xiàn dù.
example_en: His patience has already reached its limit.

example_zh: 这款手机有现货，今天就能发出。
example_pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒu jī yǒu xiàn huò, jīn tiān jiù néng fā chū.
example_en: This phone is in stock and can be shipped today.

example_zh: 报名人数限于三十人。
example_pinyin: Bào míng rén shù xiàn yú sān shí rén.
example_en: Registration is limited to thirty people.

gloss: it is said; according to legend
example_zh: 相传这座桥有三百年历史。
example_pinyin: Xiāng chuán zhè zuò qiáo yǒu sān bǎi nián lì shǐ.
example_en: It is said that this bridge has a history of three hundred years.

example_zh: 两座城市由高速铁路相连。
example_pinyin: Liǎng zuò chéng shì yóu gāo sù tiě lù xiāng lián.
example_en: The two cities are connected by high-speed rail.

example_zh: 她不喜欢味道太浓的香水。
example_pinyin: Tā bù xǐ huan wèi dao tài nóng de xiāng shuǐ.
example_en: She does not like perfume with a very strong scent.

example_zh: 那个小偷儿很快被警察抓住了。
example_pinyin: Nà ge xiǎo tōur hěn kuài bèi jǐng chá zhuā zhù le.
example_en: That thief was quickly caught by the police.

example_zh: 她脸上的笑容让大家安心了。
example_pinyin: Tā liǎn shàng de xiào róng ràng dà jiā ān xīn le.
example_en: The smile on her face reassured everyone.

example_zh: 这项政策的效应还需要观察。
example_pinyin: Zhè xiàng zhèng cè de xiào yìng hái xū yào guān chá.
example_en: The effect of this policy still needs to be observed.

example_zh: 他把心爱的相机带去旅行。
example_pinyin: Tā bǎ xīn ài de xiàng jī dài qù lǚ xíng.
example_en: He took his beloved camera on the trip.

example_zh: 她从心底感谢老师的帮助。
example_pinyin: Tā cóng xīn dǐ gǎn xiè lǎo shī de bāng zhù.
example_en: She thanked the teacher from the bottom of her heart.

example_zh: 这家店刚上架了一批新款鞋。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn gāng shàng jià le yì pī xīn kuǎn xié.
example_en: This store has just put a batch of new-style shoes on the shelves.

example_zh: 新媒体改变了人们获取信息的方式。
example_pinyin: Xīn méi tǐ gǎi biàn le rén men huò qǔ xìn xī de fāng shì.
example_en: New media has changed the way people get information.

example_zh: 在我心目中，她是一位优秀的作家。
example_pinyin: Zài wǒ xīn mù zhōng, tā shì yí wèi yōu xiù de zuò jiā.
example_en: In my mind, she is an excellent writer.

example_zh: 新能源产业正在快速发展。
example_pinyin: Xīn néng yuán chǎn yè zhèng zài kuài sù fā zhǎn.
example_en: The new energy industry is developing rapidly.

example_zh: 新兴行业吸引了许多年轻人。
example_pinyin: Xīn xīng háng yè xī yǐn le xǔ duō nián qīng rén.
example_en: Emerging industries have attracted many young people.

example_zh: 她终于实现了多年的心愿。
example_pinyin: Tā zhōng yú shí xiàn le duō nián de xīn yuàn.
example_en: She finally fulfilled a wish she had held for many years.

example_zh: 网上学习在很多地区兴起。
example_pinyin: Wǎng shàng xué xí zài hěn duō dì qū xīng qǐ.
example_en: Online learning has emerged in many regions.

example_zh: 请把电脑的型号写在表格里。
example_pinyin: Qǐng bǎ diàn nǎo de xíng hào xiě zài biǎo gé lǐ.
example_en: Please write the computer model in the form.

example_zh: 这家酒店的性价比很高。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiā jiǔ diàn de xìng jià bǐ hěn gāo.
example_en: This hotel offers very good value for money.

example_zh: 编辑正在修订这本教材。
example_pinyin: Biān jí zhèng zài xiū dìng zhè běn jiào cái.
example_en: The editor is revising this textbook.

example_zh: 这件外套的袖子有点长。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiàn wài tào de xiù zi yǒu diǎn cháng.
example_en: The sleeves of this coat are a little long.

example_zh: 我下学期想选修心理学。
example_pinyin: Wǒ xià xué qī xiǎng xuǎn xiū xīn lǐ xué.
example_en: I want to take psychology as an elective next semester.

example_zh: 他加入了当地的语言学会。
example_pinyin: Tā jiā rù le dāng dì de yǔ yán xué huì.
example_en: He joined the local language association.

example_zh: 培训班里有二十名学员。
example_pinyin: Péi xùn bān lǐ yǒu èr shí míng xué yuán.
example_en: There are twenty trainees in the training class.

example_zh: 医生说这条血管需要进一步检查。
example_pinyin: Yī shēng shuō zhè tiáo xuè guǎn xū yào jìn yí bù jiǎn chá.
example_en: The doctor said this blood vessel needs further examination.

example_zh: 报名时需要填写自己的血型。
example_pinyin: Bào míng shí xū yào tián xiě zì jǐ de xuè xíng.
example_en: You need to fill in your blood type when registering.

example_zh: 运动能促进血液循环。
example_pinyin: Yùn dòng néng cù jìn xuè yè xún huán.
example_en: Exercise can promote blood circulation.

example_zh: 他们正在寻求更好的解决办法。
example_pinyin: Tā men zhèng zài xún qiú gèng hǎo de jiě jué bàn fǎ.
example_en: They are seeking a better solution.

example_zh: 大雨把低处的道路淹了。
example_pinyin: Dà yǔ bǎ dī chù de dào lù yān le.
example_en: The heavy rain flooded the low-lying road.

example_zh: 学校对考试纪律要求很严。
example_pinyin: Xué xiào duì kǎo shì jì lǜ yāo qiú hěn yán.
example_en: The school is very strict about exam discipline.

example_zh: 专家们正在研讨新的治疗方案。
example_pinyin: Zhuān jiā men zhèng zài yán tǎo xīn de zhì liáo fāng àn.
example_en: Experts are discussing and studying a new treatment plan.

example_zh: 他的言语很真诚。
example_pinyin: Tā de yán yǔ hěn zhēn chéng.
example_en: His words were very sincere.

example_zh: 这种药可以减轻炎症。
example_pinyin: Zhè zhǒng yào kě yǐ jiǎn qīng yán zhèng.
example_en: This medicine can reduce inflammation.

gloss: to see with one's eyes; soon
example_zh: 眼看天就要黑了，我们该回去了。
example_pinyin: Yǎn kàn tiān jiù yào hēi le, wǒ men gāi huí qù le.
example_en: It is almost dark, so we should go back.

example_zh: 孩子仰着头看星星。
example_pinyin: Hái zi yǎng zhe tóu kàn xīng xing.
example_en: The child looked up at the stars.

example_zh: 他们正在计划退休后的养老生活。
example_pinyin: Tā men zhèng zài jì huà tuì xiū hòu de yǎng lǎo shēng huó.
example_en: They are planning their life in old age after retirement.

example_zh: 这家养老院离医院很近。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiā yǎng lǎo yuàn lí yī yuàn hěn jìn.
example_en: This nursing home is very close to the hospital.

example_zh: 他买了三样点心。
example_pinyin: Tā mǎi le sān yàng diǎn xin.
example_en: He bought three kinds of snacks.

example_zh: 你要么现在走，要么等到明天。
example_pinyin: Nǐ yào me xiàn zài zǒu, yào me děng dào míng tiān.
example_en: Either leave now or wait until tomorrow.

example_zh: 这片山里有很多野花。
example_pinyin: Zhè piàn shān lǐ yǒu hěn duō yě huā.
example_en: There are many wild flowers in this mountain area.

example_zh: 你去也好，不去也好，都要告诉我。
example_pinyin: Nǐ qù yě hǎo, bú qù yě hǎo, dōu yào gào su wǒ.
example_en: Whether you go or not, you must tell me.

example_zh: 这里禁止捕捉野生动物。
example_pinyin: Zhè lǐ jìn zhǐ bǔ zhuō yě shēng dòng wù.
example_en: It is forbidden to catch wild animals here.

example_zh: 学生们在野外观察植物。
example_pinyin: Xué sheng men zài yě wài guān chá zhí wù.
example_en: The students observed plants in the field.

example_zh: 服务业需要更多专业人才。
example_pinyin: Fú wù yè xū yào gèng duō zhuān yè rén cái.
example_en: The service industry needs more professionals.

example_zh: 这份报告分析了城市居民的衣食住行。
example_pinyin: Zhè fèn bào gào fēn xī le chéng shì jū mín de yī shí zhù xíng.
example_en: This report analyzes city residents' basic necessities of life.

example_zh: 医药费用近年有所上涨。
example_pinyin: Yī yào fèi yòng jìn nián yǒu suǒ shàng zhǎng.
example_en: Medical and pharmaceutical costs have risen somewhat in recent years.

example_zh: 老师把问题一一解释清楚。
example_pinyin: Lǎo shī bǎ wèn tí yī yī jiě shì qīng chu.
example_en: The teacher explained the questions one by one.

example_zh: 我姨今天来家里吃饭。
example_pinyin: Wǒ yí jīn tiān lái jiā lǐ chī fàn.
example_en: My aunt is coming to my home for dinner today.

example_zh: 学校一带有很多书店。
example_pinyin: Xué xiào yí dài yǒu hěn duō shū diàn.
example_en: There are many bookstores around the school area.

example_zh: 我们一道去看展览吧。
example_pinyin: Wǒ men yí dào qù kàn zhǎn lǎn ba.
example_en: Let's go see the exhibition together.

example_zh: 公司推出了一系列新产品。
example_pinyin: Gōng sī tuī chū le yì xì liè xīn chǎn pǐn.
example_en: The company launched a series of new products.

example_zh: 窗外吹来一阵凉风。
example_pinyin: Chuāng wài chuī lái yí zhèn liáng fēng.
example_en: A cool breeze blew in from outside the window.

example_zh: 这处古城遗址吸引了很多游客。
example_pinyin: Zhè chù gǔ chéng yí zhǐ xī yǐn le hěn duō yóu kè.
example_en: This ancient city site has attracted many tourists.

example_zh: 每天运动对健康有很多益处。
example_pinyin: Měi tiān yùn dòng duì jiàn kāng yǒu hěn duō yì chù.
example_en: Daily exercise has many benefits for health.

example_zh: 祝你的新工作一帆风顺。
example_pinyin: Zhù nǐ de xīn gōng zuò yì fān fēng shùn.
example_en: I wish you smooth sailing in your new job.

example_zh: 他一口气跑到了山顶。
example_pinyin: Tā yì kǒu qì pǎo dào le shān dǐng.
example_en: He ran to the top of the mountain without stopping.

example_zh: 这两张照片看起来一模一样。
example_pinyin: Zhè liǎng zhāng zhào piàn kàn qǐ lái yì mú yí yàng.
example_en: These two photos look exactly the same.

example_zh: 这位艺人在舞台上非常自信。
example_pinyin: Zhè wèi yì rén zài wǔ tái shàng fēi cháng zì xìn.
example_en: This performer is very confident on stage.

example_zh: 他穿了一身黑色西装。
example_pinyin: Tā chuān le yì shēn hēi sè xī zhuāng.
example_en: He wore a full black suit.

gloss: for a short time; for the moment
example_zh: 我一时想不起他的名字。
example_pinyin: Wǒ yì shí xiǎng bù qǐ tā de míng zi.
example_en: I could not remember his name for the moment.

example_zh: 我们一同完成了这个项目。
example_pinyin: Wǒ men yì tóng wán chéng le zhè ge xiàng mù.
example_en: We completed this project together.

example_zh: 这个软件易于操作。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge ruǎn jiàn yì yú cāo zuò.
example_en: This software is easy to operate.

example_zh: 这种药能抑制疼痛。
example_pinyin: Zhè zhǒng yào néng yì zhì téng tòng.
example_en: This medicine can suppress pain.

example_zh: 会议因大雨推迟了。
example_pinyin: Huì yì yīn dà yǔ tuī chí le.
example_en: The meeting was postponed because of the heavy rain.

example_zh: 这个词有三个音节。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge cí yǒu sān ge yīn jié.
example_en: This word has three syllables.

example_zh: 她在比赛中获得了银牌。
example_pinyin: Tā zài bǐ sài zhōng huò dé le yín pái.
example_en: She won a silver medal in the competition.

example_zh: 老师引了一句古诗说明观点。
example_pinyin: Lǎo shī yǐn le yí jù gǔ shī shuō míng guān diǎn.
example_en: The teacher quoted an old poem to explain the point.

example_zh: 文件被隐藏在系统文件夹里。
example_pinyin: Wén jiàn bèi yǐn cáng zài xì tǒng wén jiàn jiā lǐ.
example_en: The file was hidden in the system folder.

example_zh: 这条新闻引发了热烈讨论。
example_pinyin: Zhè tiáo xīn wén yǐn fā le rè liè tǎo lùn.
example_en: This news triggered a heated discussion.

example_zh: 学校计划引入新的教学方法。
example_pinyin: Xué xiào jì huà yǐn rù xīn de jiào xué fāng fǎ.
example_en: The school plans to introduce a new teaching method.

example_zh: 这里的饮用水经过严格检测。
example_pinyin: Zhè lǐ de yǐn yòng shuǐ jīng guò yán gé jiǎn cè.
example_en: The drinking water here has passed strict testing.

example_zh: 请在这里印上公司的标志。
example_pinyin: Qǐng zài zhè lǐ yìn shàng gōng sī de biāo zhì.
example_en: Please print the company's logo here.

example_zh: 客人正在餐厅用餐。
example_pinyin: Kè rén zhèng zài cān tīng yòng cān.
example_en: The guests are dining in the restaurant.

example_zh: 这把小刀用处很多。
example_pinyin: Zhè bǎ xiǎo dāo yòng chù hěn duō.
example_en: This small knife has many uses.

example_zh: 这家公司用人很谨慎。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiā gōng sī yòng rén hěn jǐn shèn.
example_en: This company is very careful when hiring people.

example_zh: 这份礼物看得出很用心。
example_pinyin: Zhè fèn lǐ wù kàn de chū hěn yòng xīn.
example_en: You can tell that a lot of care went into this gift.

example_zh: 工程师正在优化系统速度。
example_pinyin: Gōng chéng shī zhèng zài yōu huà xì tǒng sù dù.
example_en: The engineer is optimizing the system speed.

example_zh: 这个习俗的由来很有意思。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge xí sú de yóu lái hěn yǒu yì si.
example_en: The origin of this custom is very interesting.

example_zh: 春天公园里的游人特别多。
example_pinyin: Chūn tiān gōng yuán lǐ de yóu rén tè bié duō.
example_en: There are especially many visitors in the park in spring.

example_zh: 这家农场只卖有机蔬菜。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiā nóng chǎng zhǐ mài yǒu jī shū cài.
example_en: This farm sells only organic vegetables.

example_zh: 这部电影越看越有劲。
example_pinyin: Zhè bù diàn yǐng yuè kàn yuè yǒu jìn.
example_en: This movie gets more interesting the more you watch it.

example_zh: 观众有序地走进会场。
example_pinyin: Guān zhòng yǒu xù de zǒu jìn huì chǎng.
example_en: The audience entered the venue in an orderly way.

example_zh: 会议于上午九点开始。
example_pinyin: Huì yì yú shàng wǔ jiǔ diǎn kāi shǐ.
example_en: The meeting begins at nine in the morning.

example_zh: 请先查看银行卡余额。
example_pinyin: Qǐng xiān chá kàn yín háng kǎ yú é.
example_en: Please check the bank card balance first.

example_zh: 我已经预定了明晚的座位。
example_pinyin: Wǒ yǐ jīng yù dìng le míng wǎn de zuò wèi.
example_en: I have already reserved seats for tomorrow night.

example_zh: 浴室的地面有点滑。
example_pinyin: Yù shì de dì miàn yǒu diǎn huá.
example_en: The bathroom floor is a little slippery.

example_zh: 我原本打算周末去北京。
example_pinyin: Wǒ yuán běn dǎ suàn zhōu mò qù Běi jīng.
example_en: I originally planned to go to Beijing on the weekend.

example_zh: 工厂需要稳定的原材料供应。
example_pinyin: Gōng chǎng xū yào wěn dìng de yuán cái liào gōng yìng.
example_en: The factory needs a stable supply of raw materials.

gloss: sweet rice dumpling for Lantern Festival
example_zh: 元宵节那天我们吃了元宵。
example_pinyin: Yuán xiāo jié nà tiān wǒ men chī le yuán xiāo.
example_en: We ate yuanxiao on the day of the Lantern Festival.

example_zh: 这个传统源于古代的节日。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge chuán tǒng yuán yú gǔ dài de jié rì.
example_en: This tradition originates from an ancient festival.

example_zh: 公司安排了远程面试。
example_pinyin: Gōng sī ān pái le yuǎn chéng miàn shì.
example_en: The company arranged a remote interview.

example_zh: 他常常想起远方的家人。
example_pinyin: Tā cháng cháng xiǎng qǐ yuǎn fāng de jiā rén.
example_en: He often thinks of his family far away.

example_zh: 月光照在安静的湖面上。
example_pinyin: Yuè guāng zhào zài ān jìng de hú miàn shàng.
example_en: Moonlight shone on the quiet lake.

example_zh: 科学家正在研究月球表面。
example_pinyin: Kē xué jiā zhèng zài yán jiū yuè qiú biǎo miàn.
example_en: Scientists are studying the surface of the moon.

example_zh: 这首乐曲听起来很优美。
example_pinyin: Zhè shǒu yuè qǔ tīng qǐ lái hěn yōu měi.
example_en: This musical piece sounds very beautiful.

example_zh: 她坐长途汽车容易晕车。
example_pinyin: Tā zuò cháng tú qì chē róng yì yùn chē.
example_en: She easily gets carsick on long bus rides.

example_zh: 这些物资将被运送到灾区。
example_pinyin: Zhè xiē wù zī jiāng bèi yùn sòng dào zāi qū.
example_en: These supplies will be transported to the disaster area.

example_zh: 这个平台由专业团队运营。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge píng tái yóu zhuān yè tuán duì yùn yíng.
example_en: This platform is operated by a professional team.

example_zh: 这个抽屉里放着很多杂物。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge chōu ti lǐ fàng zhe hěn duō zá wù.
example_en: There are many miscellaneous items in this drawer.

example_zh: 这场灾让村子损失很大。
example_pinyin: Zhè chǎng zāi ràng cūn zi sǔn shī hěn dà.
example_en: This disaster caused great losses to the village.

example_zh: 志愿者把食品送到灾区。
example_pinyin: Zhì yuàn zhě bǎ shí pǐn sòng dào zāi qū.
example_en: Volunteers delivered food to the disaster area.

example_zh: 这些材料可以再生利用。
example_pinyin: Zhè xiē cái liào kě yǐ zài shēng lì yòng.
example_en: These materials can be recycled and reused.

example_zh: 老师赞赏他的认真态度。
example_pinyin: Lǎo shī zàn shǎng tā de rèn zhēn tài dù.
example_en: The teacher admired his serious attitude.

example_zh: 大多数成员赞同这个决定。
example_pinyin: Dà duō shù chéng yuán zàn tóng zhè ge jué dìng.
example_en: Most members agree with this decision.

example_zh: 这个计划遭到了一些反对。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge jì huà zāo dào le yì xiē fǎn duì.
example_en: This plan met with some opposition.

example_zh: 施工噪声影响了附近居民。
example_pinyin: Shī gōng zào shēng yǐng xiǎng le fù jìn jū mín.
example_en: Construction noise affected nearby residents.

example_zh: 鞭炮突然炸了，大家都吓了一跳。
example_pinyin: Biān pào tū rán zhà le, dà jiā dōu xià le yí tiào.
example_en: The firecracker suddenly exploded, and everyone was startled.

example_zh: 胶水把纸粘在一起。
example_pinyin: Jiāo shuǐ bǎ zhǐ zhān zài yì qǐ.
example_en: The glue stuck the papers together.

example_zh: 线上销售占比已经超过一半。
example_pinyin: Xiàn shàng xiāo shòu zhàn bǐ yǐ jīng chāo guò yí bàn.
example_en: The share of online sales has already exceeded half.

example_zh: 他们终于战胜了所有困难。
example_pinyin: Tā men zhōng yú zhàn shèng le suǒ yǒu kùn nan.
example_en: They finally overcame all the difficulties.

example_zh: 这家公司占有很大的市场份额。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiā gōng sī zhàn yǒu hěn dà de shì chǎng fèn é.
example_en: This company holds a large market share.

example_zh: 请阅读第三章的内容。
example_pinyin: Qǐng yuè dú dì sān zhāng de nèi róng.
example_en: Please read the content of Chapter Three.

example_zh: 服务员把账单放在桌上。
example_pinyin: Fú wù yuán bǎ zhàng dān fàng zài zhuō shàng.
example_en: The waiter put the bill on the table.

example_zh: 公司正在招新员工。
example_pinyin: Gōng sī zhèng zài zhāo xīn yuán gōng.
example_en: The company is recruiting new employees.

example_zh: 这所学校今年计划招生五百人。
example_pinyin: Zhè suǒ xué xiào jīn nián jì huà zhāo shēng wǔ bǎi rén.
example_en: This school plans to enroll five hundred students this year.

example_zh: 她在车站向我们招手。
example_pinyin: Tā zài chē zhàn xiàng wǒ men zhāo shǒu.
example_en: She waved to us at the station.

example_zh: 这个房间的照明效果很好。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge fáng jiān de zhào míng xiào guǒ hěn hǎo.
example_en: The lighting in this room is very good.

example_zh: 护士给病人打了一针。
example_pinyin: Hù shi gěi bìng rén dǎ le yì zhēn.
example_en: The nurse gave the patient an injection.

example_zh: 这个镇靠近海边。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge zhèn kào jìn hǎi biān.
example_en: This town is near the sea.

example_zh: 下午可能会有阵雨。
example_pinyin: Xià wǔ kě néng huì yǒu zhèn yǔ.
example_en: There may be showers in the afternoon.

example_zh: 他们因为小事争吵起来。
example_pinyin: Tā men yīn wèi xiǎo shì zhēng chǎo qǐ lái.
example_en: They started quarreling over a small matter.

example_zh: 请把照片的正面朝上放。
example_pinyin: Qǐng bǎ zhào piàn de zhèng miàn cháo shàng fàng.
example_en: Please place the front side of the photo facing up.

example_zh: 他之所以迟到，是因为路上堵车。
example_pinyin: Tā zhī suǒ yǐ chí dào, shì yīn wèi lù shàng dǔ chē.
example_en: The reason he was late was that there was traffic on the way.

example_zh: 公司职员都参加了培训。
example_pinyin: Gōng sī zhí yuán dōu cān jiā le péi xùn.
example_en: All company employees attended the training.

example_zh: 医生的职责是保护病人的健康。
example_pinyin: Yī shēng de zhí zé shì bǎo hù bìng rén de jiàn kāng.
example_en: A doctor's duty is to protect patients' health.

gloss: to have no choice but to
example_zh: 雨太大，我们只得取消活动。
example_pinyin: Yǔ tài dà, wǒ men zhǐ dé qǔ xiāo huó dòng.
example_en: The rain was too heavy, so we had no choice but to cancel the activity.

gloss: to only care about; be absorbed in
example_zh: 他只顾看手机，没听见我说话。
example_pinyin: Tā zhǐ gù kàn shǒu jī, méi tīng jiàn wǒ shuō huà.
example_en: He was only looking at his phone and did not hear me speak.

example_zh: 这种药由本地药厂制成。
example_pinyin: Zhè zhǒng yào yóu běn dì yào chǎng zhì chéng.
example_en: This medicine is made by a local pharmaceutical factory.

example_zh: 安全培训对新员工至关重要。
example_pinyin: Ān quán péi xùn duì xīn yuán gōng zhì guān zhòng yào.
example_en: Safety training is extremely important for new employees.

example_zh: 这家店出售各种木制品。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn chū shòu gè zhǒng mù zhì pǐn.
example_en: This shop sells all kinds of wooden products.

example_zh: 记者质疑了这份报告的数据。
example_pinyin: Jì zhě zhì yí le zhè fèn bào gào de shù jù.
example_en: The reporter questioned the data in this report.

example_zh: 这件衣服是中等号码。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiàn yī fu shì zhōng děng hào mǎ.
example_en: This piece of clothing is a medium size.

example_zh: 我们等了两个钟头。
example_pinyin: Wǒ men děng le liǎng ge zhōng tóu.
example_en: We waited for two hours.

example_zh: 他的脚踝肿了起来。
example_pinyin: Tā de jiǎo huái zhǒng le qǐ lái.
example_en: His ankle swelled up.

gloss: to hit; win; be affected by
example_zh: 他中了奖，高兴得说不出话。
example_pinyin: Tā zhòng le jiǎng, gāo xìng de shuō bù chū huà.
example_en: He won a prize and was so happy he could not speak.

example_zh: 爷爷年轻时一直在农村种地。
example_pinyin: Yé ye nián qīng shí yì zhí zài nóng cūn zhòng dì.
example_en: Grandpa farmed in the countryside when he was young.

example_zh: 食物变质可能会导致中毒。
example_pinyin: Shí wù biàn zhì kě néng huì dǎo zhì zhòng dú.
example_en: Spoiled food may cause poisoning.

example_zh: 她买彩票第一次就中奖。
example_pinyin: Tā mǎi cǎi piào dì yī cì jiù zhòng jiǎng.
example_en: She won a prize the first time she bought a lottery ticket.

example_zh: 众人听到消息后都很惊讶。
example_pinyin: Zhòng rén tīng dào xiāo xi hòu dōu hěn jīng yà.
example_en: Everyone was surprised after hearing the news.

example_zh: 天气太热，老人容易中暑。
example_pinyin: Tiān qì tài rè, lǎo rén róng yì zhòng shǔ.
example_en: In very hot weather, elderly people are prone to heatstroke.

example_zh: 这家店专门设计珠宝。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn zhuān mén shè jì zhū bǎo.
example_en: This shop specializes in designing jewelry.

example_zh: 这个项目面临诸多挑战。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge xiàng mù miàn lín zhū duō tiǎo zhàn.
example_en: This project faces many challenges.

example_zh: 她是这个节目的主播。
example_pinyin: Tā shì zhè ge jié mù de zhǔ bō.
example_en: She is the host of this program.

example_zh: 这部电影的主角是一名医生。
example_pinyin: Zhè bù diàn yǐng de zhǔ jué shì yì míng yī shēng.
example_en: The main character in this film is a doctor.

example_zh: 这部话剧由年轻演员主演。
example_pinyin: Zhè bù huà jù yóu nián qīng yǎn yuán zhǔ yǎn.
example_en: This play stars young actors.

example_zh: 我衷心祝愿你们幸福。
example_pinyin: Wǒ zhōng xīn zhù yuàn nǐ men xìng fú.
example_en: I sincerely wish you happiness.

example_zh: 这家医院有眼科专科门诊。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiā yī yuàn yǒu yǎn kē zhuān kē mén zhěn.
example_en: This hospital has a specialized ophthalmology clinic.

example_zh: 这条通道是员工专用的。
example_pinyin: Zhè tiáo tōng dào shì yuán gōng zhuān yòng de.
example_en: This passage is for staff use only.

example_zh: 她做实验时非常专注。
example_pinyin: Tā zuò shí yàn shí fēi cháng zhuān zhù.
example_en: She is very focused when doing experiments.

example_zh: 请把文件转换成 PDF 格式。
example_pinyin: Qǐng bǎ wén jiàn zhuǎn huàn chéng PDF gé shì.
example_en: Please convert the file to PDF format.

example_zh: 请把这封信转交给经理。
example_pinyin: Qǐng bǎ zhè fēng xìn zhuǎn jiāo gěi jīng lǐ.
example_en: Please pass this letter on to the manager.

example_zh: 他听到声音后立刻转身。
example_pinyin: Tā tīng dào shēng yīn hòu lì kè zhuǎn shēn.
example_en: He turned around immediately after hearing the sound.

example_zh: 机器的轮子开始转动。
example_pinyin: Jī qì de lún zi kāi shǐ zhuàn dòng.
example_en: The machine's wheel began to rotate.

example_zh: 孩子们在院子里捉蝴蝶。
example_pinyin: Hái zi men zài yuàn zi lǐ zhuō hú dié.
example_en: The children caught butterflies in the yard.

example_zh: 这里的自来水可以直接饮用。
example_pinyin: Zhè lǐ de zì lái shuǐ kě yǐ zhí jiē yǐn yòng.
example_en: The tap water here can be drunk directly.

example_zh: 保持自律对学习很重要。
example_pinyin: Bǎo chí zì lǜ duì xué xí hěn zhòng yào.
example_en: Maintaining self-discipline is important for study.

example_zh: 新闻报道应谨慎处理自杀事件。
example_pinyin: Xīn wén bào dào yīng jǐn shèn chǔ lǐ zì shā shì jiàn.
example_en: News reports should handle suicide cases carefully.

example_zh: 旅行让他更了解自我。
example_pinyin: Lǚ xíng ràng tā gèng liǎo jiě zì wǒ.
example_en: Travel made him understand himself better.

example_zh: 她一边整理书架，一边自言自语。
example_pinyin: Tā yì biān zhěng lǐ shū jià, yì biān zì yán zì yǔ.
example_en: She talked to herself while organizing the bookshelf.

example_zh: 这家餐厅提供自助早餐。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiā cān tīng tí gōng zì zhù zǎo cān.
example_en: This restaurant provides a self-service breakfast.

example_zh: 这次活动总计有两百人参加。
example_pinyin: Zhè cì huó dòng zǒng jì yǒu liǎng bǎi rén cān jiā.
example_en: A total of two hundred people took part in this event.

example_zh: 端午节我们包了很多粽子。
example_pinyin: Duān wǔ jié wǒ men bāo le hěn duō zòng zi.
example_en: We made many zongzi for the Dragon Boat Festival.

example_zh: 这笔钱足够买车票。
example_pinyin: Zhè bǐ qián zú gòu mǎi chē piào.
example_en: This amount of money is enough to buy the ticket.

example_zh: 大雪阻挡了车辆前进。
example_pinyin: Dà xuě zǔ dǎng le chē liàng qián jìn.
example_en: The heavy snow blocked the vehicles from moving forward.

example_zh: 孩子钻进了桌子下面。
example_pinyin: Hái zi zuān jìn le zhuō zi xià miàn.
example_en: The child crawled under the table.

example_zh: 他承认了自己的罪。
example_pinyin: Tā chéng rèn le zì jǐ de zuì.
example_en: He admitted his crime.
